steps.text: Receive flight plan and weather briefing from dispatch
steps.hint: Preparation begins before you reach the aircraft

steps.text: Conduct external walk-around inspection of the aircraft
steps.hint: Eyes on the airframe before anything else

steps.text: Complete cockpit preflight checks and power-up avionics
Coordinate with ground crew for passenger boarding
steps.hint: Passengers need to be on board before you can leave

steps.text: Receive final passenger count and confirm weight & balance
steps.hint: The numbers must add up for a safe departure

steps.text: Request pushback clearance from ground control
Start engines and complete after-start checklist
Taxi to assigned runway via cleared route
Complete before-takeoff checklist and arm flight systems
steps.hint: Final checks at the hold-short line

steps.text: Receive takeoff clearance and advance throttles
